shots.video_prompt: CONTINUITY LOCK @Aiko-001: identical 26-year-old Japanese-American female performer (Aiko Nakamura), same face, wardrobe, hair, eye-line and blocking — seamless continuation of prior take, zero jump cut. CONTINUITY LOCK @Set-Warehouse-Industrial-001: identical industrial loft — same window grid camera-left, same concrete floor, same brick tone, same beam geometry — seamless continuation, zero jump cut. STYLE LOCK @Style-Cinematic-001: cinematic grade — shallow depth of field, dramatic side key, controlled bloom on highlights, filmic S-curve, subtle anamorphic horizontal flare on practicals only, no flat YouTube lighting. Establishing wide of location, atmospheric, no dialogue required. Camera: wide static or slow crane down. Industrial window 4800K directional key locked — dust motes optional, deep shadow pockets, no magenta brick bounce, no cool fill contamination, zero hue drift. Strong key from camera left or right at 45°, fill ratio 1:4 max, rim optional single edge — lock side every segment. COLOR LOCK Warehouse: brick #8B4A3B desaturated, concrete #A8A8A8, metal #5C5C5C, window light warm-neutral 4800K — no purple shadows, no teal concrete, no neon practicals. GRADE LOCK Cinematic: teal pushed only in shadows -5% max OR amber highlights +5% — never both teal and orange at full saturation (no blockbuster split unless locked shot). Forbid magenta skin, forbid green yellow cast, forbid flat grey mids. Slow dolly or crane; rack focus motivated; no snap zoom. Finish on gesture peak or rack-focus completion, never hold dead stillness or dead frame.
